authProfile.description: Auth profile used for this reset. `null` selects the default root auth; omission leaves the app-server's selected auth profile unchanged.

creditId.description: Opaque reset-credit identifier to redeem. When omitted, the backend selects the next available credit.

expectedAccountIdentityFingerprint.description: Opaque account fingerprint from the read that selected this reset credit.

idempotencyKey.description: Identifies one logical reset attempt. A UUID is recommended; reuse the same value when retrying that attempt.
